nodes.label: Jest Setup Configuration
nodes.description: Global test setup file with polyfills for TextEncoder, TextDecoder, fetch, Headers, Request, Response, ResizeObserver, and matchMedia. Includes mocks for next/server, next/navigation, better-auth, jose, nanoid, nanostores, slug, uncrypto, and crypto.

nodes.label: Jest Configuration
nodes.description: Jest configuration using next/jest with jsdom environment, path aliases (@/*), and transform ignore patterns for ES modules.

nodes.label: Next.js Configuration
nodes.description: Next.js config with image domain patterns for Google and S3, React strict mode, compression, bundle analyzer support, and dynamic base URL configuration for Vercel.

nodes.label: PostCSS Configuration
nodes.description: PostCSS config with Tailwind CSS plugin.

nodes.label: Drizzle ORM Configuration
nodes.description: Drizzle Kit configuration for Turso database with snake_case casing, schema location, and migration output directory.

nodes.label: Playwright E2E Test Configuration
nodes.description: Playwright config for E2E testing with multiple browsers (Chrome, Firefox, WebKit) and mobile devices, with dev server configuration.

nodes.label: ESLint Configuration
nodes.description: ESLint flat config with Next.js core web vitals, Prettier integration, and custom rules for React and unused variables.

nodes.label: JOSE Library Mock
nodes.description: Mock for the JOSE (JSON Object Signing and Encryption) library used in testing to avoid ES module issues.

nodes.label: Post Page Component Tests
nodes.description: Tests for the PostPage component including rendering, post display, loading states, and infinite scroll functionality.

nodes.label: GIF Compression Tests
nodes.description: Tests for GIF compression functionality using modern-gif library, including file validation, compression effectiveness, error handling, and default options.

nodes.label: Signup Form Tests
nodes.description: Tests for user signup form including validation, password matching, API integration, and error handling.

nodes.label: Login Form Tests
nodes.description: Tests for user login form including credentials validation, password visibility toggle, and router navigation on success.

nodes.label: Authentication Middleware Tests
nodes.description: Tests for authentication middleware logic including username requirement checks, redirect behavior, and session validation.

nodes.label: Redirect Middleware Tests
nodes.description: Comprehensive tests for username redirect middleware including 301 redirects for old usernames, 404 for invalid usernames, case sensitivity, and special route handling.

nodes.label: Mobile Dock Context Tests
nodes.description: Tests for MobileDockProvider context including action and config provision, default config handling, and error throwing when used outside provider.

nodes.label: Username Change Redirect Tests
nodes.description: Tests for username change redirect logic including reusing previously used usernames, cache updates, and page slug updates.

nodes.label: Username Change Tests
nodes.description: Comprehensive tests for username change functionality including availability checking, cooldown periods, history tracking, and page/short link updates.

nodes.label: Links View Search Performance Tests
nodes.description: Performance tests for links view search functionality ensuring no full page reload, proper debouncing, and efficient UI updates.

nodes.label: Search Links View Tests
nodes.description: Tests for SearchLinksView component including input handling, debouncing, clear button, loading states, and accessibility.

nodes.label: Mobile Dock Accessibility Tests
nodes.description: Accessibility tests for MobileDock component including WCAG compliance, ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, focus management, and screen reader compatibility.

nodes.label: Mobile Dock Integration Tests
nodes.description: Integration tests for MobileDock with different providers testing button triggers and input focus functionality.
